description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized banana with a gently curved shape and a smooth, slightly matte yellow peel. The peel displays some minor brown spots and blemishes, particularly near the ends, indicating natural handling and aging. The stem is intact and slightly dried, while the tip is pointed and free from major damage. The banana's surface is mostly unbroken, with no visible tears or splits, and the overall form is plump and well-defined. The coloration is predominantly yellow with subtle gradients and a few brownish marks, typical of a ripe banana. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on the peel.
description: A gently curved, medium-sized yellow banana with minor brown spots and an intact stem. The peel is smooth and unbroken, showing natural blemishes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and curvature of the banana, with the stem on the left and the tip on the right.
description_view_1: End-on view of the banana's stem, highlighting the circular base and some brown blemishes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the banana's curvature and the tip on the left, stem on the right.
description_view_3: End-on view of the banana's tip, showing the pointed end and the smooth, slightly blemished peel.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is mostly intact with minor brown spots and blemishes, especially near the ends. There are no visible tears, splits, or signs of peeling, and the surface appears smooth.
